---
title: "Major the Hon. James Ulysses Graham Raymond Colborne, 4th Lord Seaton"
---

## Major the Hon. James Ulysses Graham Raymond Colborne, 4th Lord Seaton

**Dates:** (1863-1955)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Third third son of the 2nd Lord Seaton, he succeeded his eldest brother as 4th Lord Seaton in 1933.

### Letters

- Letter from March 30th [1900]
- Letter from Feb 17th [1885] 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
